title: Sodium LOD Fixer
description: Fixes Sodium for LOD rendering mods like Distant Horizons, Voxy, Nvidium or Bobby
body:
Drastically improves the performance of Sodium's OcclusionCuller when using a LOD mod such as Distant Horizons, Voxy, Nvidium or Bobby.

When using one of these LOD mods, it'll overload Sodium's single threaded while loop OcclusionCuller typically causing a huge drop in FPS performance and frame hitching. This mod fixes that bottle neck in Sodium's OcclusionCuller.

Nvidium does the same patch, but for a Nvidia based GPU.

![LOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C0Mcmx3E/images/fe2175cc547abf4412ccd7fc88d5991c323980d1.jpeg)
